channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Foo
item.description:
A Test!

# My Awesome Load Balancer Here!
resource "aws_lb" "web" {
    name = "my-awesome-lb"
    foo = "${var.foo}-${var.wee}"
}

Can we get one of these things?

If I do this echo "foo" >> bar.txt"

item.title: Post 3

item.title: Post 2
item.description:
This is Post 2.
